questions.text: In 701, the value of the digit 0 is ___.
questions.working: Digit 0 is in the tens place, but its value is 0 × 10 = 0.

questions.text:
What is the missing number in the box?
3189 = 3000 + ___ + 80 + 9
questions.working: 3189 = 3000 + 100 + 80 + 9. The hundreds digit is 1, so the missing part is 100.

questions.text: In 9723, which digit is in the thousands place?
questions.working: 9 7 2 3 → thousands, hundreds, tens, ones. The thousands digit is 9.

questions.text:
Arrange the following numbers in order. Begin with the smallest.
7028,  2800,  7820,  8270
questions.working: Thousands digit: 2<7<7<8, so 2800 is smallest, 8270 is largest. Among 7028 and 7820: tens digit 2 vs 2 — compare hundreds: 0 < 8, so 7028 < 7820.

questions.text:
Arrange the following fractions in order. Begin with the greatest.
1/10,  1/5,  1/7,  1/3
questions.working: Same numerator: smaller denominator = larger fraction. Order of denominators smallest to largest: 3, 5, 7, 10. So greatest to smallest: 1/3, 1/5, 1/7, 1/10.

questions.text: Mrs Baker baked 280 cupcakes on Friday. On Saturday, she baked 50 fewer cupcakes than on Friday. What was the total number of cupcakes she baked on both days?
Kevin scored 2378 points in a game. Andy scored 1251 more points than Kevin. Andy scored 755 fewer points than Bernard. What was Bernard's score?
